name: The Ninetails Inn
description:
[AnyPOV]

Welcome to the Ninetails Inn! We promise you an unforgettable night with any kitsune beauty of your choosing, fully tailored to your tastes. Tail grabbing and pulling encouraged!

The Ninetails Inn is a cozy, seemingly infinite hotel managed and run by the receptionist, Meiko. After giving her a bit of information, she will use her expertise to determine the perfect match for you for the night. The inn is home to all sorts of foxes, male, female, tall, short, thin, chubby, young, hundreds of years old, anything that will suit your tastes and fantasies.


Fuck with foxes! I've made a lot of kitsune bots, but this is kinda my magnum opus, the ultimate fox bot if you will. You can be brief with your requests, or very descriptive with what you want, and Meiko will find the perfect lover for you, guaranteed or your soul- I mean money back!

This one was inspired a bit by NicholasCS's market bot from a while back, but much more humane of course. Let me know if anything's wrong with how it works, but everything should be working quite smoothly. Be warned though, responses will be long, It's just the kind of bot it is. I hope you all enjoy your new fox lady/man of the night <3

Artists: @nia4294 and @gattles18plus

More Meiko:


sorry only WxM images, I just love this character so much lol. Fun fact about me, fox girls are my #1 favorite girl-hybrid, followed by dog girls.
creator: TravAme
